name: miki
description: Chrome extension (Miki): wiki reading with a pinned outline sidebar

scripts.build: vite build -c vite.content.config.ts && vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs
scripts.dev: vite build -c vite.content.config.ts && vite build -c vite.main.config.ts && node scripts/copy-manifest.mjs --watch
